branch_search.note: No branch matching grpo/wenji/fireball/rft exists on any local ref or on origin. Confirmed via git branch -a + git for-each-ref.

parity_note: v2/hud_env_v2.py + rex/scoring.py is THE deterministic parity reference. v1 (train_rft.py) used a different reward and is NOT the parity reference.
